case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. XIHONG HU et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-26-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
